name: Shock IA
tagline: AI-powered multi-tenant CRM with WhatsApp, campaigns, and voice
description: A comprehensive AI-powered CRM platform for managing customer conversations across WhatsApp and web channels. Features intelligent chatbots with OpenAI function calling, RAG with pgvector embeddings, WhatsApp integration via WRC SDK, campaign management with stage-based pipelines, voice transcription with ElevenLabs, appointment booking via Cal.com, and real-time conversation management through Chatwoot.
highlights: AI chatbots with OpenAI function calling and RAG via pgvector embeddings
WhatsApp integration with WRC SDK for automated customer conversations
Multi-stage campaign management with pipeline automation
Voice transcription with ElevenLabs and speech synthesis
Chatwoot integration for omnichannel conversation management
Cal.com booking integration and Google Sheets sync
